## API Information

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **API Name** | |
| **URL** | |
| **Description** | |
| **Auth** | `No` / `apiKey` / `OAuth` |
| **HTTPS** | `Yes` / `No` |
| **CORS** | `Yes` / `No` / `Unknown` |
| **Category** | |

## Checklist

- [ ] I have verified the API is free to use
- [ ] I have verified the API link is working
- [ ] The API is not already in the list
- [ ] I have included all required information above
